user.title: Hub'Eau - Data selection
user.description: Choose one or more Hub'Eau themes to integrate. You can add other themes later by creating a new integration entry.

location.title: Location
location.description: Enter your commune's INSEE code (e.g. {exemple}) for commune-based data. For station-based themes (piezometry, hydrometry, river temperature, groundwater quality, hydrobiology, coastal monitoring), enter your GPS coordinates and a search radius: the next step will suggest nearby stations.

station.title: Station selection — {theme_name}
station.description: {count} station(s) found within the chosen radius. Pick one from the list, or enter a known Hub'Eau station code directly.

error.no_theme_selected: Please select at least one theme.
error.gps_required_for_stations: GPS coordinates are required to search for nearby stations.
error.station_required: Please choose a station from the list or enter a code manually.
